0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0830_EC_EMER_ROOM (M0830) Hospital Emergency Room Emergent care: hospital emergency room. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0830_EC_NONE (M0830) No Emergent Care Services Emergent care: no emergent care services. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0830_EC_OUTPAT (M0830) Outpatient Department Emergency Emergent care: outpatient department/clinic emergency. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0830_EC_UK (M0830) Unknown Emergent Care Emergent care: unknown. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x
